items.prompt: Did the office sort out the new IDs?
items.prompt_task_text: Did the office sort out the new IDs?
items.answer: I picked up my ID card.

items.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you after class?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Professor Cho ask you after class?
items.answer: She wanted to know whether I understood the entire morning lecture.

items.prompt: Where did you end up studying last night?
items.prompt_task_text: Where did you end up studying last night?
items.answer: I studied in the empty seminar room upstairs.

items.prompt: I just started as a transfer student here.
items.prompt_task_text: I just started as a transfer student here.
items.answer: Where do I collect my campus parking pass?

items.prompt: Have you signed up for the volunteer fair?
items.prompt_task_text: Have you signed up for the volunteer fair?
items.answer: I haven't registered for the volunteer fair yet.

items.prompt: Which roommate helped you move the furniture?
items.prompt_task_text: Which roommate helped you move the furniture?
items.answer: The roommate who owns the truck helped me.

items.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about renewals?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the librarian tell you about renewals?
items.answer: She explained how the renewal system works.

items.prompt: Why did you miss our usual seminar today?
items.prompt_task_text: Why did you miss our usual seminar today?
items.answer: The evening seminar was relocated to the newly renovated east wing.

items.prompt: The career center apparently moved offices.
items.prompt_task_text: The career center apparently moved offices.
items.answer: Which building houses the career center now?

items.prompt: What did your advisor say about the deadline?
items.prompt_task_text: What did your advisor say about the deadline?
items.answer: She said the proposal was due Friday.

items.prompt: Did you drop off the permission slip?
items.prompt_task_text: Did you drop off the permission slip?
items.answer: I left the slip at the office.

items.prompt: What did Julian ask you about the trip?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Julian ask you about the trip?
items.answer: He wondered whether the trip fee covered our meals.

items.prompt: Why did you head to campus so early?
items.prompt_task_text: Why did you head to campus so early?
items.answer: I grabbed breakfast and reviewed my lab report.

items.prompt: The intramural season is starting soon.
items.prompt_task_text: The intramural season is starting soon.
items.answer: Which office handles the team signups?

items.prompt: Have you turned in the field trip form?
items.prompt_task_text: Have you turned in the field trip form?
items.answer: I didn't submit the field trip form.

items.prompt: What did the front desk tell you?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the front desk tell you?
items.answer: The replacement keys were left at the desk.

items.prompt: How did you finally get the right textbook?
items.prompt_task_text: How did you finally get the right textbook?
items.answer: The bookstore finally restocked the textbook edition that our professor had required.

items.prompt: You worked at the tutoring lab before.
items.prompt_task_text: You worked at the tutoring lab before.
items.answer: Which nights does the math lab stay open?

items.prompt: How did your meeting with the dean go?
items.prompt_task_text: How did your meeting with the dean go?
items.answer: I asked whether my transfer credits would count.

items.prompt: What did the counselor tell you afterward?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the counselor tell you afterward?
items.answer: The academic counselor said that my graduation plan looked complete now.
